Entries.JojaCCIntro/GameStateQuery LOCATION_ACCE: continue/32 13/Morris 33 13 2 farmer 33 19 0/move farmer 0 -4 0 true/skippable/emote Morris 32/pause 500/speak Morris "Welcome @!$h#$b#Thank you so much for volunteering to help fill the new Joja Civic Center."/pause 500/faceDirection Morris 1/pause 200/faceDirection Morris 3/pause 200/faceDirection Morris 2/pause 200/speak Morris "As you can see it's already in much better shape than that old run down Community Center, but we still need to fill it with local produce and that's where you come in.#$b#Hopefully then we will be able to entice a few of the local villagers to come open a few shops in here."/pause 300/emote farmer 32/pause 500/speak Morris "I've placed several books around to let you know what is needed, and as you complete the bundles more books will show up for you to complete.#$b#And of course there will be plenty of rewards to compensate you for all of your hard work.$h"/pause 300/emote farmer 20/pause 500/speak Morris "Here let me show you around."/pause 500/move Morris 0 -2 1/move farmer 0 -2 1/pause 500/speak Morris "Here is what we hope to be a fish pond filled with local fish."/pause 300/speak Morris "And over here..."/pause 200/faceDirection Morris 3 true/pause 100/faceDirection farmer 3/pause 200/speak Morris "What is this?$3"/pause 300/move Morris -3 0 0/move farmer -3 0 0/pause 200/emote Morris 8/pause 500/faceDirection Morris 2/pause 500/speak Morris "I don't know who placed this here but don't worry. I will get it all sorted out."/pause 500/speak Morris "Anyway let me show you the pantry as well. It's just over here."/pause 300/move Morris -2 0 3 farmer -2 0 3 true/fade/viewport 16 9 clamp true/warp Morris 14 5 true/warp farmer 14 7 true/faceDirection Morris 1 true/faceDirection farmer 1/pause 300/speak Morris "And here is the pantry which we desperately need filled with crops and cooking products so that we can open up the kitchen."/pause 500/faceDirection Morris 2/pause 100/faceDirection farmer 0/pause 500/speak Morris "So as you can see there is a lot of work ahead of you, but I'm sure that it will be a very rewarding experience for all of us.$h"/pause 500/speak Morris "Also don't forget to stop by JojaMart and purchase some Communtiy Development projects when you're able to.#$b#With your help JojaMart will really be able to brighten up this small town!$h"/pause 500/end

Changes.LogName: Joja CC Treasure Hunt Start Event Data

Entries.TreasureHuntBundleStart/GameStateQuery P: continue/39 36/Jas 42 36 3 Vincent 42 37 3 farmer 39 35 2/pause 500/skippable/speak Jas "Hey @!$h"/pause 200/faceDirection farmer 1/pause 500/emote farmer 32/pause 300/move farmer 0 1 1 true/speak Vincent "Did you see our Treasure Hunt bundle in the new Civic Center?"/pause 200/quickQuestion #Morris was upset that it was there.#I did see it, but what is a Treasure Hunt Tag?#(break)pause 300\speak Jas "Who's Morris?$3"\pause 500\faceDirection Vincent 0\speak Vincent "I think he's that old man that runs the new store?"\pause 500\speak Jas "Oh well don't worry about him. Come follow us and we'll tell you everything!$h"\faceDirection Vincent 3(break)pause 300\speak Jas "Oh it's part of a new game that me and Vincent made up.#$b#Come follow us and we'll tell you everything!$h"(break)/pause 300/move Jas -2 0 0/playSound openBox/move Vincent -2 0 0 true/pause 300/warp Jas -1 -1/playSound doorClose/fade/viewport -1000 -1000/changeLocation JojaCC/addObject 30 10 (O)blue704.JojaCC_bundlebook 0/warp Jas 29 12/warp Vincent 31 11/warp farmer 30 14/playMusic jaunty/pause 1000/viewport 30 10 true/move farmer 0 -2 0 Jas 0 -2 1 Vincent 0 -1 3/pause 800/speak Vincent "Here it is!$h"/pause 500/faceDirection Jas 2 true/pause 100/faceDirection Vincent 2 true/pause 800/speak Jas "We put a lot of work into this."/pause 600/speak Vincent "Yeah I built the sign all by myself."/pause 500/quickQuestion Would you like to play a Treasure Hunt game with us?#Yeah I'd love to guys!#I don't know I'm pretty busy around the farm these days...#(break)pause 300\emote Jas 20 true\emote Vincent 20 true\speak Vincent "Yes I knew you would play with us!$h"\pause 500\speak Jas "All you have to do is follow the clues on the sign to where another bundle is located somewhere in the valley.#$b#Once you complete that bundle you'll get a special Treasure Hunt Tag that you can bring back here for a big reward."\pause 800\speak Vincent "I bet you won't be able to find them all. We hid them real good."\pause 1000\emote farmer 20\pause 300\speak Jas "The other bundle won't be ready until the next day though!#$b#Give us some time to set it all up.$h"\pause 1000\speak Vincent "Yes!$h#$b#I get to do the first one."(break)pause 200\emote Jas 28 true\emote Vincent 28 true\pause 1000\action AddFriendshipPoints Jas -250\action AddFriendshipPoints Vincent -250\speak Vincent "Well if you change your mind @ we'll leave it here...$s"\pause 1000\speak Jas "We worked really hard making this @!$s#$b#If you just try it I know you'll have fun..."\pause 800\speak Vincent "I guess the clues are on my sign if you decide to play our game later...$s"(break)/pause 500/end

Changes.LogName: Joja CC Farmer Bundle 01 Complete Event Data

Entries.FarmerBundle01Complete/GameStateQuery PL: continue/-2000 -2000/Morris 92 53 1 farmer -100 -100 0/message "Just now at JojaMart..."/viewport 96 51/addObject 97 52 (F)LargeJojaCrate/fade false/pause 500/skippable/emote Morris 8/pause 800/speak Morris "What do we have here?#$b#It must be that shipment that I was expecting!$h"/pause 300/move Morris 4 0 1/pause 300/shake Morris 800/playSound openBox/pause 300/speak Morris "Yes! Just what I was expecting.#$b#Pierre thought he had the upper hand but now JojaMart is the only supplier of these premium seeds.$h"/pause 500/speak Morris "Let's see what is in here exactly.#$b#There are garlic, rhubarb, strawberry, blueberry, red cabbage, artichoke, beet, and what else is in here at the bottom?"/pause 500/emote Morris 16/pause 400/speak Morris "There are even starfruit and cactus seeds in here!#$b#Haha. Pierre is in trouble now..."/pause 500/end

Changes.LogName: Joja CC Farmer Bundle 05 Complete Event Data

Entries.FarmerBundle05Complete/GameStateQuery PL: continue/-2000 -2000/Morris 92 53 1 farmer -100 -100 0/message "Just now at JojaMart..."/viewport 96 51/addObject 97 52 (F)LargeJojaCrate/fade false/pause 500/skippable/emote Morris 8/pause 800/speak Morris "What is that smell?#$b#It's terrible!"/move Morris 1 0 2/pause 400/faceDirection Morris 3/pause 400/faceDirection Morris 1/pause 300/speak Morris "It is coming from the box.#$b#That must mean that it's the shipment of fertilizer I ordered."/pause 600/move Morris 3 0 1/pause 300/shake Morris 800/playSound openBox/pause 300/speak Morris "Cough.Cough.#$b#It's even worse inside.#$b#I hope this fertilizer sells better than it smells."/pause 500/speak Morris "Let's see what is in here exactly.#$b#There is some tree fertilizer, some deluxe retaining soil, a little deluxe fertilizer, and what else is that?"/pause 500/emote Morris 16/pause 400/speak Morris "There's even some hyper speed gro in here!#$b#I thought that stuff was radioactive..."/pause 500/end

Changes.LogName: Joja CC Forager Bundle Complete Event Data

Entries.ForagerBundleComplete/GameStateQuery PLA: continue/39 36/Morris 39 37 0 farmer 40 35 2 Leah 40 37 0/action AddMail current ForagerBundleCompleteEventSeen tomorrow/pause 500/skippable/speak Morris "Ah, perfect timing. I see you just completed the Forager Bundle."/pause 300/emote farmer 20/pause 500/speak Morris "I was just bringing Leah here to see the new shop that she's opening.#$b#Let's step inside so that Leah can see her new place."/pause 300/emote Leah 32/pause 500/move Morris 0 -2 0 true/fade/changeToTemporaryMap JojaCC/viewport -2000 -2000/warp Morris 13 22/warp Leah 13 20/faceDirection Leah 2/warp farmer 11 20/faceDirection farmer 1/playMusic jaunty/viewport 13 22/faceDirection Leah 3/pause 400/faceDirection Leah 1/pause 400/faceDirection Leah 3/pause 500/emote Leah 20/pause 500/speak Leah "Wow this is amazing!$h#$b#Thank you @. I know that it was a lot of work to find all of those things, but I am really grateful."/pause 300/speak Leah "And to show my appreciation me and Morris have a little surprise for you!$h"/pause 500/faceDirection Leah 2/pause 300/speak Morris "That's right. Leah has discovered a lovely clearing behind the Bus Stop and has asked Joja to open a path so that you can use it.$h"/pause 500/faceDirection Leah 3/pause 300/speak Leah "You'll love it @! There's even an old shed there that I'm sure you'll find a use for.$h"/pause 600/speak Morris "Just give us some time and we'll have it opened right up for you.#$b#I believe we should have all of the work done by tomorrow morning."/pause 500/emote farmer 20/pause 500/end

Entries.ForagerBundleAreaComplete/GameStateQuery: continue/-2000 -2000/Morris 34 8 0 farmer -100 -100 0/pause 500/message "Early this morning behind the Bus Stop..."/pause 500/skippable/changeToTemporaryMap Backwoods/viewport 34 11/pause 500/skippable/emote Morris 32/pause 500/move Morris 0 -2 0/pause 300/speak Morris "It looks like they did a wonderful job clearing this pathway yesterday."/pause 300/move Morris 0 -3 0/warp Morris -100 -100 true/changeToTemporaryMap ForagerMapEvent/warp Morris 122 36/viewport 119 32/pause 500/emote Morris 32/pause 500/move Morris 0 -3 1/pause 300/speak Morris "Leah was right.#$b#This old shed even looks like it's in pretty good shape."/pause 500/move Morris 5 0 0/pause 300/emote Morris 20/pause 500/speak Morris "I wonder what @ will decide to do with this old place...$h"/pause 500/end

Changes.LogName: Joja CC Farmer Bundle Complete Event Data

Entries.FarmerBundleComplete/GameStateQuery PLAY: continue/39 36/Morris 39 37 0 farmer 40 35 2 Evelyn 40 37 0/pause 500/action AddMail current FarmerBundleCompleteEventSeen tomorrow/skippable/speak Morris "Ah, perfect timing. I see you just completed the Farmer Bundle."/pause 300/emote farmer 20/pause 500/speak Morris "I was just bringing Mrs. Mullner here to see the new shop that she's opening.#$b#Let's step inside so that she can see her new place."/pause 300/emote Evelyn 32/pause 500/move Morris 0 -2 0 true/fade/changeToTemporaryMap JojaCC/viewport -2000 -2000/addObject 16 6 (O)blue704.JojaCC_cellarfloorpatch 1/warp Morris 6 7/faceDirection Morris 1/warp Evelyn 7 7/warp farmer 7 10/faceDirection farmer 0/playMusic jaunty/fade/viewport 7 9/faceDirection Evelyn 3/pause 400/faceDirection Evelyn 1/pause 400/faceDirection Evelyn 0/pause 500/emote Evelyn 20/pause 500/speak Evelyn "Oh my goodness this is amazing.$h"/pause 500/move Evelyn 0 -2 0/faceDirection Morris 0/pause 300/speak Evelyn "This kitchen is just so beautiful.$h"/pause 200/move Evelyn -1 0 0/pause 300/emote Evelyn 20/pause 300/faceDirection Evelyn 2/pause 500/speak Evelyn "Thank you @. I can only imagine how hard you worked to stock this kitchen so well.$h"/pause 300/emote farmer 32/pause 500/speak Evelyn "But do you know what is missing?$h"/pause 500/emote Morris 8 true/emote farmer 8/pause 300/faceDirection Evelyn 1/pause 300/speak Evelyn "It would be just perfect if we could have a little cellar inside the pantry over there."/pause 500/faceDirection Evelyn 2/pause 300/emote Morris 16/speak Morris "You know Mrs. Mullner, I was thinking the exact same thing.$h#$b#Joja's workers are coming today to install one right away. If all goes to plan, it should be ready to age some Joja wine and mead bright and early tomorrow morning!$h"/pause 600/speak Evelyn "Oh my goodness.#$b#It couldn't be more perfect you two."/pause 500/emote Morris 32 true/emote farmer 20/pause 500/speak Evelyn "This will be the perfect place to share some of my recipes and my food with the whole town."/pause 500/end

Changes.LogName: Joja CC Farmer Bundle Area Event Data

Entries.FarmerBundleAreaComplete/GameStateQuery: continue/-2000 -2000/Morris 16 11 0 farmer -100 -100 0/pause 500/message "Early this morning at the Joja Civic Center..."/pause 500/changeToTemporaryMap JojaCC/viewport 16 10/pause 500/skippable/emote Morris 32/pause 500/move Morris 0 -1 0/pause 300/speak Morris "It looks like they did a wonderful job building the new cellar yesterday."/pause 300/move Morris 0 -2 0/warp Morris -100 -100 true/fade/changeToTemporaryMap JojaCCcellar/viewport -2000 -2000/warp Morris 4 6/faceDirection Morris 2/viewport 21 10/pause 300/speak Morris "Just perfect!$h#$b#I'm sure @ will make good use of this place aging lots of Joja wine and mead."/pause 500/emote Morris 20/pause 500/speak Morris "Just think of the profits...$h"/pause 500/end

Changes.LogName: Joja CC Boiler Bundle Complete Event Data

Entries.BoilerBundleComplete/GameStateQuery PLAY: continue/39 36/Morris 39 37 0 farmer 40 35 2 Clint 40 37 0/action AddMail current BoilerBundleCompleteEventSeen tomorrow/pause 500/skippable/speak Morris "Ah, perfect timing. I see you just completed the Boiler Room Bundle."/pause 300/emote farmer 20/pause 500/speak Morris "I was just bringing Clint here to see the new shop that he's opening.#$b#Let's step inside so that Clint can see his new place."/pause 300/emote Clint 32/pause 500/move Morris 0 -2 0 true/fade/changeToTemporaryMap JojaCC/viewport -2000 -2000/warp Morris 60 16/warp Clint 63 16/faceDirection Morris 1/warp farmer 62 18/faceDirection farmer 0/playMusic jaunty/viewport 61 16/faceDirection Clint 3/pause 400/faceDirection Clint 1/pause 400/faceDirection Clint 2/pause 500/emote Clint 20/pause 500/speak Clint "I've never seen a boiler room so clean before Mr. Todd. And thank you @ for filling it with all of the things a guy like myself could need.#$b#I've always wanted to move the shop out of my house and this looks like the perfect place for me to set up shop permanently.$h"/pause 300/faceDirection Clint 3/emote Morris 20/pause 500/speak Morris "That's amazing Clint!$h#$b#Joja will make sure that you have everything you need here."/pause 500/emote Clint 32/pause 500/faceDirection Clint 2/pause 500/speak Clint "I was also telling Mr. Todd here about a new cave that I discovered back in the mountains near Demetrius' house.#$b#It had a couple of big rocks inside that my tools couldn't even touch so I asked Morris if JojaCo could break them up for you."/pause 500/faceDirection Clint 3 true/speak Morris "We will certainly see what we can do Clint. I haven't heard of anything that JojaCo can't overcome!$h"/pause 500/faceDirection Clint 2/pause 300/speak Clint "Well even if they can't bust those rocks I'm sure you'll find the old cave useful @. There was even an old machine in there that looks like it was used to crush geodes.#$b#I asked Demetrius to see if he was able to fix it up for you even though it may put me out of business!$h"/pause 500/faceDirection Clint 3/pause 300/speak Morris "JojaCo plans to get to work right away and we hope to have that cave opened up for you by tomorrow morning so that you can move right on in!$h"/pause 500/emote farmer 20/pause 500/end

Changes.LogName: Joja CC Boiler Bundle Area Event Data

Entries.BoilerBundleAreaComplete/GameStateQuery: continue/-2000 -2000/Morris 6 7 0 farmer -100 -100 0/pause 500/message "Early this morning in the mountains..."/pause 500/changeToTemporaryMap Mountain/viewport 7 9 clamp true true/pause 500/skippable/emote Morris 32/pause 500/move Morris 0 -1 0/pause 300/speak Morris "It looks like they did a beautiful job opening up this cave."/pause 300/move Morris 0 -2 0/warp Morris -100 -100 true/fade/changeToTemporaryMap ClintsCaveEvent/viewport -2000 -2000/warp Morris 37 12/faceDirection Morris 0/viewport 38 13/pause 300/speak Morris "This must be that old machine that Clint was speaking about?"/pause 500/move Morris 0 -1 0/pause 500/emote Morris 8/pause 500/move Morris -1 0 0/pause 500/emote Morris 40/pause 500/speak Morris "I wonder it's supposed to be used for?#$b#Oh well..."/pause 300/faceDirection Morris 2/pause 300/emote Morris 8/pause 500/speak Morris "They didn't clear the rocks?$3"/pause 500/move Morris 0 5 3/pause 500/speak Morris "Hmmm...#$b#Well if JojaCo can't bust through them I'm afraid @ will just have to live with it like this."/pause 500/speak Morris "But there should be plenty of ore to mine in here soon anyway!"/pause 500/end

Changes.LogName: Joja CC Demetrius Hints at Cave2 Event Data

Entries.DemetriusHintsatCave2/GameStateQuery PLA: Cavern/38 11/Demetrius 37 11 0 farmer 43 11 3/skippable/move farmer -4 0 3/pause 500/faceDirection Demetrius 1/pause 500/speak Demetrius "Oh there you are @!#$b#Clint told me that you'd be heading this way."/pause 500/speak Demetrius "I just finished fixing up this old geode crusher here. It's quite a bit larger than modern day geode crushers but the engineering is just magnificent!$h#$b#It can output over 1000PSI of force and is able to pulverize the densest of materials while still not damaging the valuables inside."/pause 500/emote farmer 32/pause 500/speak Demetrius "I haven't been able to thoroughly test it, but I believe it should be able to process any geode imaginable. Even something like mystery boxes or golden coconuts."/pause 500/emote farmer 20/pause 500/speak Demetrius "And it's easy to operate as well. It functions essentially the same as a mill."/pause 500/move Demetrius -1 0 0/pause 300/speak Demetrius "All you need to do is place your unprocessed geodes here, and then you can pick up the processed goods on the other side the next day."/pause 500/faceDirection Demetrius 1/pause 500/speak Demetrius "But that's not all @. Let me show you something else right over there..."/pause 300/emote farmer 8/pause 300/fade/warp Demetrius 68 8 true/warp farmer 67 10 true/faceDirection farmer 1 true/faceDirection Demetrius 1 true/viewport 67 10 true/pause 500/speak Demetrius "I'm sure Clint told you about these rocks that his tools couldn't penetrate correct? Well Joja was up here the other night throwing everything they had at them too but look at them now. Not even a scratch..."/pause 500/move Demetrius 1 0 1/pause 300/emote Demetrius 8/pause 500/move farmer 2 0 1 true/speak Demetrius "But if you look closely they have been worked on in the past. And there are traces of iridium around them as well."/pause 500/faceDirection Demetrius 2/pause 200/faceDirection farmer 0/pause 500/speak Demetrius "I've heard there used to be a tribe of dwarves that lived in these mountains. I used to think that it was just a myth but this may be proof of their existence#$b#Sadly I don't think you'll be able to delve deeper into this cave unless you somehow become friends with a dwarf..."/pause 300/emote Demetrius 32/pause 500/speak Demetrius "Haha! Listen to me.#$b#Friends with a dwarf. What kind of scientist am I? Haha!"/pause 500/end

Changes.LogName: Joja CC Dwarf Clears Stones Event Data

Entries.DwarfClearsStones/GameStateQuery PLAYER_: nightTime/-2000 -2000/farmer -100 -100 0/playSound explosion/pause 1000/playSound explosion/pause 500/playSound explosion/pause 1000/message "Are those explosions coming from the mountains?"/changeToTemporaryMap ForagerMapEvent2/addTemporaryActor Dwarf 16 24 126 5 2 true Character/ambientLight 200 200 0/viewport 123 8 clamp true true/skippable/pause 1000/speak Dwarf "Ah..."/pause 500/emote Dwarf 32/pause 800/speak Dwarf "It has been such a long time since I've been to the surface.#$b#How humans can stand this brightness is beyond me."/pause 300/speak Dwarf "What did @ call them?#$b#Stars?"/pause 800/speak Dwarf "There is a certain beauty to them..."/pause 800/speak Dwarf "I hope removing those rocks makes @ happy.#$b#It is nice to have a human friend once again..."/pause 500/emote Dwarf 20/pause 500/end
